zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle de Champagne-Blois於1140年6月11日出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦布盧瓦 2 坎頓時，她的父親Thibaut IV de Blois47歲，母親Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim32歲。她於1160年11月13日與Louis VII le Jeune roi de France在法國阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1206年6月4日在法國阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲享年65歲，埋葬在法國布格奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adèle de Champagne-Blois于1140年6月11日出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦布盧瓦 2 坎頓时，她的父亲Thibaut IV de Blois47岁，母亲Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim32岁。她于1160年11月13日与Louis VII le Jeune roi de France在法国阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1206年6月4日在法国阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲享年65岁，埋葬在法国布格奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

variants.name: Adel
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

variants.name: Adelle
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adèle de Champagne-Blois was born on 11 June 1140, in Blois 2e Canton, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Thibaut IV de Blois, was 47 and her mother, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, was 32. She married Louis VII le Jeune roi de France on 13 November 1160, in Archdiocese of Paris, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 4 June 1206, in Archdiocese of Paris, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Auxerre, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle de Champagne-Blois est née le 11 juin 1140, à Blois 2e Canton, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Thibaut IV de Blois, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Louis VII le Jeune roi de France le 13 novembre 1160, à Archidiocèse de Paris, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1206, à Archidiocèse de Paris, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Auxerre, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle de Champagne-Blois am 11. Juni 1140 in Blois 2e Canton, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibaut IV de Blois 47 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim 32. Sie hat am 13. November 1160 in Archidiocèse de Paris, Frankreich Louis VII le Jeune roi de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1206 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Archidiocèse de Paris, Frankreich und wurde in Auxerre, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Champagne-Blois è nata il il 11 giugno 1140 nel Blois 2e Canton, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Thibaut IV de Blois, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Louis VII le Jeune roi de France il 13 novembre 1160, nel Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 giugno 1206, nel Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Auxerre, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adèle de Champagne-Bloisが1140年6月11日にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスブロイス 2 カントンで生まれた時，父Thibaut IV de Bloisは47歳，母Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheimは32歳であった。1160年11月13日にフランスアーチディオクeゼ ド パーイスでLouis VII le Jeune roi de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1206年6月4日にフランスアーチディオクeゼ ド パーイスで65歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンアウクセアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle de Champagne-Blois(이)가 1140년 6월 11일 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스 블로이스 2 캔턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibaut IV de Blois(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1160년 11월 13일 프랑스 아치디오ce스 데 파리스에서 Louis VII le Jeune roi de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1206년 6월 4일 프랑스 아치디오ce스 데 파리스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 오세르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Champagne-Blois nasceu em 11 de junho de 1140, em Blois 2e Canton, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Thibaut IV de Blois, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis VII le Jeune roi de France em 13 de novembro de 1160, em Archidiocèse de Paris, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1206, em Archidiocèse de Paris, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Auxerre, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle de Champagne-Blois родилась 11 июня 1140 г. в местности блоис 2 кантон, блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Thibaut IV de Blois было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis VII le Jeune roi de France 13 ноября 1160 г. в местности арчидиокeс де пэрис, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 июня 1206 г. в местности арчидиокeс де пэрис, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ауксирр, бургогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle de Champagne-Blois nació el 11 de junio de 1140, en Blois 2e Canton, Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Thibaut IV de Blois, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Louis VII le Jeune roi de France el 13 de noviembre de 1160, en Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de junio de 1206, en Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Auxerre, Bourgogne, Francia.
